codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior failure: the sender now broadcasts a full `decision` payload (`promptId`, `peerPubkey`, `decision`, `scope.verb`) and receivers both dismiss the mirrored prompt and apply `setPolicyOverride` locally, while preserving legacy `policy-resolved` compatibility and avoiding re-broadcast loops. This closes the original cross-tab state divergence gap identified in the prior review.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The runtime-worker RED-first testing procedure appears to have been skipped without being captured in skillFeedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session `db446435-26c1-45c3-89c4-3c13676b81a5` shows `Edit` operations on `src/app/AppStateProvider.tsx` before creation of `src/app/__tests__/broadcastPolicyDecision.test.tsx`, and no failing test run for the new spec prior to implementation. Handoff skillFeedback in `.../handoffs/2026-04-21T21-09-00-614Z__fix-m2-broadcast-policy-decision-payload__db446435-26c1-45c3-89c4-3c13676b81a5.json` only records the agent-browser deviation.

summary: PASS: reviewed the original failed feature diff (6c69d3fc...) and the fix diff (46fb265c...). The fix adequately resolves the original multi-tab broadcast-payload failure by propagating and applying full policy decisions across tabs with compatibility and no-echo behavior; no blocking code defects were found in the fix.
